violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to apply for a RICFSM with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026

Chicken, meatballs, and sausage was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026
The walk-in cooler gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine, and walk-in fan guards have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026

Establishment is not maintaining logs for Pizza. Permission to use Time as a Public Health Control contingent upon maintenance of records. Establishment must maintain daily records and keep on file for inspector review. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024
Gaskets for 2 door lowboy at prep unit were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
